name: NIST AI RMF: MANAGE — Risks Prioritized
description: AI risks are prioritized and acted upon based on assessment and impact.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MANAGE 1: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
